textByHashes.a400fa79e35c3dabbd2833a3bc9dbc1a724bbade: I might be, I might not. Buy ush a drink and find out .

textByHashes.8d64c21aad7cfbd410230e9db44d3f3db1ca77d9: But I saw some interesting things down in the ruins...
textByHashes.2eefba276184be6fae5ab71092d6bf93e0e72b00: Some of the markings on the wall look very familiar to me. I've seen them before.
